metadata.name: Test
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Silvermarch.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Silvermarch
towns.description: A walled outpost on the frontier, always on guard against the wilds.

key_dungeons.name: Crimson Keep
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Crimson Keep. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Crimson Keep and claim the Moonstone Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.
